backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed requirements: favicon generation and HTML integration with link tags.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including pages, diagrams, routing, navigation, and styling for a renewable energy educational site with dark mode support.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point referencing a favicon at /assets/generated/favicon.dim_32x32.png and loading the React app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, energy topic pages (solar, hydro, wind, geothermal, biomass, biofuels), quiz, and sources wrapped in SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Biofuel: SVG diagram component illustrating ethanol and biodiesel production pathways with crops, grinding, fermentation, distillation steps and dark mode color support.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Biomass: SVG diagram component showing biomass energy conversion from fuel through combustion, boiler, steam, turbine, and generator with dark mode styling.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Geother: SVG diagram component depicting a geothermal power plant with underground reservoir, production well, turbine, generator, cooling tower, and injection well with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/PVCellD: SVG diagram component illustrating how photovoltaic cells convert sunlight to electricity, showing N-type and P-type silicon layers, electron flow, and DC output with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/WaterTu: SVG diagram component depicting hydropower generation from reservoir through penstock to turbine and generator, showing water flow and electricity output with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/WindTur: SVG diagram component showing wind turbine components (blades, rotor hub, nacelle, tower) and the conversion of wind energy to electricity with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/quiz/AnswerOptio: Button component for quiz answer choices that displays visual feedback (green for correct, red for incorrect) based on selection state and answer correctness.
frontend/src/components/quiz/QuizQuestio: Card component that displays a single quiz question with four answer options, handles answer selection, shows immediate feedback, and provides navigation to the next question.
frontend/src/components/quiz/QuizResults: Card component displaying final quiz score with percentage, performance message, trophy icon, and restart button to generate a new randomized quiz.
frontend/src/components/site/RouteTransi: Wrapper component that applies a fade-in animation to page content when navigating between routes.
Footer component displaying copyright information, site description, and attribution link with dark mode support.
Layout wrapper component providing consistent header navigation and footer structure for all application pages with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/site/SiteNav.tsx: Responsive navigation bar component with links to all site sections, a theme toggle, and a mobile hamburger menu using Sheet component.
frontend/src/components/site/ThemeToggle: Theme toggle button component that switches between light and dark modes, persisting the preference in localStorage.
frontend/src/constants/site.ts: Exports the site name constant 'Renewable Energy Sources' for consistent branding.
frontend/src/data/quizQuestions.ts: Defines quiz question data structure and exports an array of multiple-choice questions covering solar, hydropower, wind, and other renewable energy topics.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling authentication state and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for future backend data fetching hooks; currently unused as the app serves static educational content.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom earth-tone color palette for light and dark modes, plus typography and prose styling utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BiofuelsPage.tsx: Educational page explaining ethanol and biodiesel production processes with step-by-step sections and includes a BiofuelsProcessDiagram component.
frontend/src/pages/BiomassEnergyPage.tsx: Renders an educational page explaining biomass energy (organic materials, combustion process, fuel types, renewability) with simplified high-school-level text and includes the BiomassProcessDiagram component with dark mode support.
Displays an educational page about geothermal energy (Earth's internal heat, underground reservoirs, electricity generation, benefits) with high-school-level explanations and includes the GeothermalDiagram component with dark mode support.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with six vertical interactive image strips (solar, hydro, wind, geothermal, biomass, biofuels) that expand on hover and link to detailed topic pages, with dark mode support.
frontend/src/pages/HydropowerTidalPage.t: Presents an educational page covering both hydropower (dams, turbines, generators) and tidal energy (ocean tides, underwater turbines) with simplified explanations and includes the WaterTurbineGeneratorDiagram component with dark mode support.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Manages the renewable energy quiz flow with randomized question selection (10 questions per quiz), tracks user answers and score, displays results, and provides restart functionality using QuizQuestion and QuizResults components.
frontend/src/pages/SolarEnergyPage.tsx: Provides an educational page explaining solar energy concepts including passive vs active solar heating systems and photovoltaic cells with the photovoltaic effect, featuring the PVCellDiagram component with dark mode support.
frontend/src/pages/SourcesPage.tsx: Displays a curated list of educational resources about renewable energy organized by category (Government, International, Educational, Non-Profit) with dark mode support.
frontend/src/pages/WindEnergyPage.tsx: Educational page explaining how wind turbines work with high-school-level text and includes a labeled wind turbine diagram component with dark mode support.
frontend/src/utils/quizHelpers.ts: Utility functions for quiz functionality including array shuffling, question selection ensuring topic representation, score calculation, and performance message generation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, earth-tone palette, typography plugin, container queries, animations, and custom design tokens for dark mode support.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file indicating pending feature request to add a renewable energy-themed favicon logo with implementation tasks for generating the icon and updating index.html.
